_comment_paths: Map the container paths the coordinator sends to how THIS machine reaches the same files (UNC/SMB or local). Longest prefix wins. Both the NAS worker and this runner must ultimately point at the same bytes.
_comment_encoders: auto = probe hevc_nvenc (needs NVIDIA driver >=610) then hevc_qsv (iGPU) then libx264. Or force one.
_comment_ai: The AI lane runs upscale/decensor as a subprocess under this venv python.
_comment_copy_local: Copy SMB input to a local temp before processing (avoids per-frame network stalls on big files). Output still lands on the shared scratch.
_comment_decensor: Optional mosaic-removal via a frozen jasna.exe (github.com/Kruk2/jasna; install-jasna.ps1 sets this up). decensor ops are advertised only while jasna_exe exists. max_clip_size 90 fits a 10GB card; 180 needs 12GB+. First run compiles TensorRT engines (15-60 min).
